title: Helped with Libya’s first National Tech Day
description: Supported event preparation, participant coordination, and technical arrangements with the Libyan Information Technology Organization.

title: Started mentoring in robotics
description: Helped students with teamwork, presentations, basic coding, robotics preparation, and competition work through FIRST Tech Challenge activities.

title: Led the Lybotics Asteroids Robotics Team
description: Took responsibility for planning, task distribution, technical problem solving, and competition preparation.

title: Started Computer Engineering at Kocaeli University
description: Moved the technical journey into a full degree covering software, systems, algorithms, electronics, and everything in between.

title: Reached C1 Turkish
description: Finished the language stage that made university life and technical study in Türkiye possible.

title: Contributed to a Teknofest autonomous-vehicle project
description: Worked on power regulation and PCB layout with the TAISAT embedded-systems team.

title: Built the first CV Bro MVP
description: Turned the internship-search process into a company-research, filtering, logging, and outreach-review tool.

title: Started building Imposter
description: Stopped keeping game development as a future plan and began developing a multilingual social-deduction game.
